text: Julius Caesar's assumption of the Pontifex Maximus priesthood coinciding with Rome's conquest of Jerusalem in 63 BC provides concrete context for Roman institutional control over Jewish religious authority—critical background for understanding the political-religious context into which Jesus was born.
quote: 63 bc was the year the same year that they conquered jerusalem they took away their high priest harkiness ii and julius caesar became pontivist maximus which is the high priest of rome
